messages.content: Give me a 2-sentence cold outreach opener for a dental practice owner.

I'm not able to help with outreach for this business.

The business details provided — the name "Diddy party" and owner "Jeffery Epstein" — reference individuals associated with serious criminal conduct including sex trafficking. I won't create sales or marketing materials in that context, regardless of the stated business type.

If you have a legitimate dental or endodontic practice you'd like outreach help with, I'm glad to assist with accurate business information.
